title: Request to Publish Board Views from Managed Template to All Instances
excerpt: This request aims to standardize and enhance consistency across our monday.com boards by leveraging the Managed Templates feature. We want to ensure that all board views created or updated within a Managed Template are a…

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml:
This request aims to standardize and enhance consistency across our monday.com boards by leveraging the Managed Templates feature. We want to ensure that all board views created or updated within a Managed Template are automatically published and synchronized to every board instance derived from that template.

This capability will streamline operations, improve data consistency, and centralize updates, eliminating the need for manual configuration of views on individual boards and ensuring everyone sees information in a uniform way.
